positive: A clean, stylized silhouette of a majestic crescent moon surrounded by whimsical floating celestial bodies: stylized planets, twinkling star clusters, and gentle nebulae swirls. The design should feature strong, graphic lines and high contrast, utilizing a limited color palette of deep indigo, ethereal teal, and glowing gold accents. The composition is centralized and symmetrical, perfect for a chest print. Style: Geometric Minimalist Tarot Art, vector illustration quality. Lighting: Dramatic, celestial glow emanating from the center. Composition: Intricate, balanced, and visually appealing on a solid background.
